home.title: Home
home.install_ios_hint: To install the app, tap the share icon at the bottom and then select 'Add to Home Screen'.
home.open_app: Please close your browser now and open the app.

mic.title: Microphone access required
mic.info:
For some tests, we need to record your voice, which requires access to your microphone.
Please allow access to continue.

exit.end_question: Do you really want to end the survey?

fatigue.title: Fatigue
fatigue.question: How much fatigue do you feel right now?

end.title: End of test
end.headline: Thank you for your participation!
end.text:
We sincerely thank you for your help.
Your answers have been saved.
end.timesup: The {{ duration }} minutes are now up.

no_test_previous.title: No test last time
no_test_previous.question: You did not take the test yesterday at {{ time }}. What was the reason?
no_test_previous.answer_no_response: I don't know / I don't want to answer.
no_test_previous.answer_wrong: That's not correct. I fully completed the test.

energy.question: The last survey should have been...
energy.answer_no_response: I don't know / I don't want to answer.

pem.question: Did the last survey trigger PEM for you?
pem.answer_unsure_relation: I had PEM, but I don't know if it was related to the last survey.
pem.answer_no_response: I don't know. / I don't want to answer.

no_test_now.title: No test now
no_test_now.question: Why can't you take the test right now?
no_test_now.answer_no_response: I don't know / I don't want to answer.

duration.title: Duration
duration.question: How many minutes of survey do you have energy for now?
duration.hint: The survey will stop after this time (+- 30 seconds).
duration.no_time: I can't do the survey right now.

symptoms.title: Symptoms
symptoms.question: How strongly are you currently experiencing the following symptoms?

memory.title: Remember words
memory.introduction:
Please memorize the following words carefully.

Afterwards, list all the words you remember.

memory_repeat.title: Memory Repeat
memory_repeat.introduction: Once you are ready, press 'Start recording'.
memory_repeat.recording_hint: Please name all the words you remember.
memory_repeat.recording_confirm_hint:
Are you really finished?
Then you can press 'Done' again.

Otherwise, list any remaining words you remember.

matching.title: Matching
matching.introduction: Please match the following symbols and numbers.

stroop.title: Stroop
stroop.introduction: Please read the word out loud.
stroop.timesup_text: The recording has been completed and saved.

sleep.question1: How long did you sleep last night?
sleep.question2: How was your sleep last night?

activities_must.question: What have you done since the last survey?
activities_must.title: Mandatory activity/activities that...

activities_free.question: What have you done since the last survey?
activities_free.title: Leisure activities that...

activities_recovery.question: What have you done to recover since the last survey?

substances.question: Have you consumed any of the following substances in the last 4 hours?

symptoms.title: Physical symptoms
symptoms.question: How strongly are you currently experiencing the following symptoms?

mood.question: How is your mood right now?

questions.one: Physically, I feel able to do only a little.
questions.two: When I do something, I can concentrate well on it.
questions.three: Physically, I trust myself to do a lot.
questions.five: It takes great effort for me to concentrate on things.
questions.six: Physically, I feel in poor condition.
questions.eight: Physically, I feel in excellent condition.
